---
pagetitle: "Rohit Pillai"
title: "Rohit Pillai"
image: images/profile.jpg
image-alt: "Rohit Pillai"
toc: false
anchor-sections: false

about:
  template: solana
  id: hero-heading
  image-width: 22em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/RohitWPillai
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=eE9rDfkAAAAJ
    - icon: r-circle
      text: esearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Rohit-Pillai-2
    - icon: building
      text: Edinburgh
      href: https://eng.ed.ac.uk/about/people/dr-rohit-pillai
    - icon: people-fill
      text: Group Website
      href: https://multiscaleflowx.github.io

page-layout: full

resources:
  - assets/index.css
  - assets/simulation.css

include-after-body:
  - assets/simulation.html
  - assets/halo.html

header-includes: |
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/simulation.css">
---

```{=html}
<div id="homepage-intro" style="display:none">
  <div class="intro-pitch">My group uses molecular simulations to study how freezing/boiling occurs, and how heat is transported at surfaces and interfaces, with applications from aircraft icing to designing next-generation cooling technologies.</div>
  <div class="intro-explore">
    <a href="projects.html" class="intro-explore-link">Explore research &rarr;</a>
  </div>
  <div class="intro-themes">
    <div class="intro-card">
      <span class="intro-card-title">Ice Nucleation & Growth</span>
      <span class="intro-card-desc">How ice forms on surfaces, vibration effects on freezing, and the design of icephobic coatings</span>
    </div>
    <div class="intro-card">
      <span class="intro-card-title">Interfacial Thermofluids</span>
      <span class="intro-card-desc">Thermal conductance at solid–liquid interfaces, surface wetting and self-cleaning, and nanomaterial-enhanced cooling</span>
    </div>
    <div class="intro-card">
      <span class="intro-card-title">Phase Change & Bubble Dynamics</span>
      <span class="intro-card-desc">Vapour bubble nucleation, wettability effects on boiling, and acoustothermal nanobubble dynamics</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var intro = document.getElementById('homepage-intro');
  var solana = document.querySelector('.quarto-about-solana');
  if (intro && solana && solana.parentNode) {
    solana.parentNode.insertBefore(intro, solana.nextSibling);
    intro.style.display = '';
  }
  var themeIds = ['ice', 'heat', 'boil'];
  document.querySelectorAll('.intro-card').forEach(function(card, i) {
    if (!themeIds[i]) return;
    card.style.cursor = 'pointer';
    card.addEventListener('click', function() {
      window.location.href = 'projects.html#theme-' + themeIds[i];
    });
  });
});
</script>
```
